blended.narrative: Mt. Spokane is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,543 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 18.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 54" over the past week. Current depth: 95".
